ressource humaine

Source: R/data.R
rh.Rd

Look up rh.

Usage

rh

Format

Data frame with 09 columns and 9364 rows

wilaya

wilaya.

structure

structure.

sexe

sexe.

datenaissance

datenaissance.

grade

grade.

specialité

specialité.

nom

nom.

prenom

prenom.

Source

DSP Djelfa

Examples

  rh
#> # A tibble: 9,364 × 10
#>    wilaya structure  nom        prenom  sexe  datenaissance   age grade nv_grade
#>    <fct>  <fct>      <chr>      <chr>   <fct> <date>        <dbl> <fct> <fct>   
#>  1 Djelfa DSP Djelfa AROUR      BELKAC… M     1963-04-27       62 Admi… AD      
#>  2 Djelfa DSP Djelfa DJAKBOUB   BACHIR  M     1972-04-09       53 Admi… AD      
#>  3 Djelfa DSP Djelfa AMOUR      SAIDA   F     1983-09-01       42 Admi… AD      
#>  4 Djelfa DSP Djelfa BEN KHATTA NAIMA   F     1979-04-21       46 Admi… AD      
#>  5 Djelfa DSP Djelfa AMDJKOUCH  SOUAD   F     1976-03-16       49 Atta… Other   
#>  6 Djelfa DSP Djelfa KAMESSE    FATIHA  F     1983-07-02       42 Secr… Other   
#>  7 Djelfa DSP Djelfa CHENIBA    KHARFIA F     1980-06-15       45 Sage… SF      
#>  8 Djelfa DSP Djelfa FAKROUNE   SAID    M     1983-07-03       42 Arch… Other   
#>  9 Djelfa DSP Djelfa GOUGUE     YAHIA   M     1983-11-21       42 Tech… Other   
#> 10 Djelfa DSP Djelfa GACEM      MILOUD  M     1983-10-05       42 Arch… Other   
#> # ℹ 9,354 more rows
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: specialité <fct>
